frames.name: Denial and Distance Frame
frames.description: Presents Clinton's testimony as categorical denials of knowledge about Epstein's crimes and emphasizes the timeline showing Clinton distanced himself before Epstein's legal troubles
frames.emphasis: Clinton's lack of knowledge about trafficking, timeline of relationship ending before 2008 guilty plea, and Trump's comments about Epstein

frames.name: Scrutiny and Specific Allegations Frame
frames.description: Focuses on detailed questioning about specific incidents, particularly the hot tub photo, and Clinton's responses to direct questions about sexual activity
frames.emphasis: Specific photographic evidence, direct questioning about sexual activity, detailed account of Clinton's extensive travel with Epstein (26+ flights)

outlierPerspectives: Trump's alleged comments to Clinton about having 'great times' with Epstein (only covered by DW)
Detailed examination of the Brunei hot tub incident with specific questioning about sexual activity (only covered by Daily Wire)
Hillary Clinton's separate deposition and claim not to remember meeting Epstein (only mentioned by DW)
missingContext: Timeline of when the Justice Department photos were taken versus when they were released
Details about what prompted this congressional investigation and its scope
Information about other witnesses or evidence being examined by the committee
Context about the broader Epstein files release and what other revelations it contained
Legal implications or potential consequences of the testimony
Comparison with previous statements Clinton has made about his relationship with Epstein
